--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13

→ Firbolg — Unarmored Caster: FAIL! 29 fire damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.

→ Mage: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3/5 targets affected.
